snapshots.label: Glean Time-Saves MVP measurement method
snapshots.recapture_policy: Productivity recapture is treated as an assumption, not a finance-approved business outcome.

dominant_assumptions.label: Base minutes saved by surface and task class
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Estimated minutes saved are derived from a base-rate table before quality adjustment.

dominant_assumptions.label: Quality multiplier
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Estimated time savings are multiplied by an output quality signal.

dominant_assumptions.label: Unclassified work fallback
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Unclassified activity uses fallback assumptions until better work-pattern classification exists.

dominant_assumptions.label: Session deduplication
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: The highest estimated event per session is retained to reduce double counting.

sensitivity_tests.modeled_effect: Adds about 258K estimated hours over the 28-day fixture window.
sensitivity_tests.claim_effect: Shows time-saved estimate is materially assumption-sensitive.

sensitivity_tests.modeled_effect: Adds about 92K estimated hours over the 28-day fixture window.
sensitivity_tests.claim_effect: Requires caveated language until multiplier governance is approved.

caveats: This snapshot supports a measurement exercise with transparent assumptions, not a final ROI claim.
Coverage is limited to search, chat, and AI Answers.
Unclassified work and no-signal multiplier assumptions materially influence the estimate.

snapshots.label: Nielsen-style internal ROI and payback fixture
snapshots.recapture_policy: Recapture assumptions require finance review and are only approved for internal planning language.

dominant_assumptions.label: Ramped quarterly benefit
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Quarterly benefit is modeled from adoption and assumed recaptured capacity.

dominant_assumptions.label: Payback period
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Payback is calculated from synthetic cost and benefit assumptions.

dominant_assumptions.label: Departmental agent uplift
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Future-state agent value is treated as a hypothesis until workflow-run and outcome evidence exist.

sensitivity_tests.modeled_effect: Materially lowers modeled net benefit and extends payback.
sensitivity_tests.claim_effect: Keeps ROI/payback language internal-only until customer-safe approval.

caveats: This fixture supports internal financial planning language only.
Customer-facing ROI and payback claims require customer-safe methodology approval.
Agent and MCP value remains an opportunity map until output-backed evidence exists.

snapshots.label: Agentic work measurement placeholder
snapshots.recapture_policy: No recapture claim is enabled until runs, completions, actions, controls, outputs, and outcomes are linked.

dominant_assumptions.label: Output-backed method required
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: Agentic work needs workflow-run, artifact, action, control, and outcome evidence instead of minutes-per-session.

caveats: Agentic work value is not computed by this placeholder.
Use this snapshot to show missing instrumentation and upgrade actions, not ROI.

snapshots.label: Suppressed unapproved value model
snapshots.recapture_policy: Suppressed because the recapture and attribution assumptions are not approved.

dominant_assumptions.label: Unsupported attribution
dominant_assumptions.value_summary: The model attributes outcome movement to AI participation without approved counterfactual evidence.

sensitivity_tests.modeled_effect: Cannot distinguish AI contribution from external operating changes.
sensitivity_tests.claim_effect: Suppresses value language until attribution evidence exists.

caveats: Do not use this snapshot for value claims.
Rejected methodology snapshots exist only to preserve audit history and explain suppression.
